text:
戻て来たね。
あんたがデカい相手を仕留める場面は
ほんと絵になるね。
写真に撮って飾っておきたいくらい。

ま、撮らなくても
見せてもらう機会はまたありそうだし。

遠慮なく声掛けさせてもらうから
よろし

You're back. The way you took down such
massive foes was truly... inspiring.

I'd love to have gotten a photograph
to keep on display.

But I imagine I'll be able to see the real thing
again, which is even better than a photo.
I won't hesitate to call on you again. Goodbye.
